title: Tanzanite
description: A mod that adds new gear and materials!
body:
![DISCONTINUED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd10d2526b4e49a5c2af7d11ba32fb75d447ea7.png)

**This mod is about _a new material_, that when combined with netherite creates better gear.**

Yes, that's it (For now).

# CURRENT ADDITIONS

- **Tanzanite Gem** - Basic material ![Tanzanite Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71897095399ecb567a7d34add95041d07a87b25.png)
- **Tanzanite Scythe** - A scythe from Tanzanite![Tanzanite Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b26e6be48b2a2f6fc3269a2d2ba5df13d5a7994.png)
- **Tanzanite Sword** - A netherite sword upgraded with tanzanite![Tanzanite Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4570f6181d5ee302e65d60c981fd6eff4fc899.png)
- **Tanzanite Smithing Template**![Tanzanite Smithing Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efd13b4df9e58659a76de3d6f0160c5a570f039.png)

# RECIPES
![Tanzanite Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65edaea181b88cae55d0a4b6dc8857c1a1555f27.png)![Tanzanite Smithing Template Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/658e6c4d2d36689b73cc020de971261ce1a1cf1c.png)
![Tanzanite Scythe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebcad82796cb127a08b7f95209e62a0bf0f16e14.png)

# PLANNED ADDITIONS
- Tanzanite tools and armor
- Scythes from Netherite, Diamonds etc.

# DISCORD SERVER
![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbda8408b614bac19d673c3bc72f5dd421042e44.png)
To learn more about the mod, join **[our Discord server](https://discord.gg/MqsXbPQPGn)**
